query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_master (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  canonicalName VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  brandId INT,
  category VARCHAR(255),
  description TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_master (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  canonicalName VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  brandId INT,
  category VARCHAR(255),
  description TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
